display.purpose: Hero name only. One per page. The single place the system goes loud.

headline.purpose: Section h2 titles. One per section. Never used for card headings.

title.purpose: Card h3 headings. Component-level hierarchy within a section.

body.purpose: Flowing prose: bio paragraphs, card descriptions. Max 65-75ch line length.

label.purpose: Tech tags, skill tags, section labels (sparingly). Mono-only. Never for sentences.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Project and plan cards on hover. Appears alongside the Y-lift transform (-4px). Never at rest.

shadows.name: accent-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary button hover. A faint orange bloom that disappears on mouse-out.

shadows.name: navbar-edge
shadows.purpose: Navbar bottom separator on scroll. Structural separator, not a floating shadow.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default state transition for color, border-color, background. Maps to --transition.

motion.name: ease-lift
motion.purpose: Card and button hover lifts (transform + box-shadow together).

motion.name: ease-reveal
motion.purpose: Section fade-in scroll reveals (opacity + translateY 24px). Reduce-motion: instant / no translate.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Navbar collapses to hamburger; logo name hidden.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: About section 2-col grid collapses to single column.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Orange fill, warm ivory text. Used for primary page actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 11px 26px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.925rem; font-weight: 600; color: #f0ece2; background: #e8641c; border: none; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; line-height: 1; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #c24e0e; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232, 100, 28, 0.18); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e8641c; outline-offset: 3px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-btn-primary { transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: none; box-shadow: none; } }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary CTA. Card background with warm divider border. Used alongside primary buttons.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 11px 26px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.925rem; font-weight: 600; color: #f0ece2; background: #201c12; border: 1px solid #2e2818; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease; line-height: 1; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #e8641c; color: #f0a06a; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e8641c; outline-offset: 3px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-btn-ghost:hover { transform: none; } }

components.name: Skill Tag
components.description: Interactive capability chip in the About section. Faded amber text on card bg; accent border on hover.
components.css: .ds-skill-list { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; } .ds-skill-tag { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 0.8rem; color: #f0a06a; background: #201c12; border: 1px solid #2e2818; padding: 5px 14px; border-radius: 6px; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease; cursor: default; list-style: none; } .ds-skill-tag:hover { border-color: #e8641c; color: #f0ece2; }

components.name: Tech Tag
components.description: Read-only technology indicator on project cards. Orange-tinted tint, no hover state.
components.css: .ds-tech-list { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; } .ds-tech-tag { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; color: #f0a06a; background: rgba(232, 100, 28, 0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(232, 100, 28, 0.25); padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 4px; list-style: none; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Core portfolio card: title, description, tech tags, GitHub link. Flat at rest; accent border + lift on hover.
components.css: .ds-project-card { background: #201c12; border: 1px solid #2e2818; border-radius: 12px; padding: 28px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.22s ease, box-shadow 0.22s ease; max-width: 360px; } .ds-project-card:hover { border-color: #e8641c; transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 16px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35); } .ds-project-card__header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; } .ds-project-card__title { font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #f0ece2; letter-spacing: -0.01em; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-project-card__link { color: #857a68; display: flex; align-items: center; transition: color 0.2s ease; text-decoration: none; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-project-card__link:hover { color: #f0a06a; } .ds-project-card__desc { font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #b8af98; line-height: 1.75; flex: 1; } .ds-project-card__tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; list-style: none; padding: 0; margin-top: 4px; } .ds-project-tag { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; color: #f0a06a; background: rgba(232, 100, 28, 0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(232, 100, 28, 0.25); padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 4px; list-style: none; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-project-card { transition: border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-project-card:hover { transform: none; box-shadow: none; } }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Fixed top navbar in its scrolled (frosted) state. Orange badge logo, warm ash links, Faded Amber CTA.
components.html:
BHBrandon Hernandez
  • About
  • Projects
  • Contact
components.css: .ds-navbar { background: rgba(16, 14, 9, 0.88); backdrop-filter: blur(14px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 #2e2818; padding: 14px 24px; } .ds-navbar__inner { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-navbar__logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; text-decoration: none; color: #f0ece2; } .ds-navbar__badge { width: 34px; height: 34px; background: #e8641c; color: #f0ece2; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.8rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-navbar__name { font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-navbar__links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; list-style: none; padding: 0; } .ds-navbar__link { color: #857a68; text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; transition: color 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease; } .ds-navbar__link:hover { color: #f0ece2; background: #201c12; } .ds-navbar__cta { color: #f0a06a; border: 1px solid #2e2818; margin-left: 8px; } .ds-navbar__cta:hover { color: #f0ece2; background: #e8641c; border-color: #e8641c; }

narrative.overview:
A space clearly in use. Everything at hand has earned its place: the tools are organized not for display but for reach, the surfaces are dark because focus is the point, and the one bright color marks exactly what matters. Nothing decorative. Nothing there to prove the bench exists — only evidence that work happens here.

The visual system holds a single committed accent (named Marty Supreme Orange by the brand, a vivid burnt orange in practice) against a warm near-black field built from three tiers of tonal depth. Mono type earns its presence by labeling data, not by costuming as 'technical.' Interactions are confirmations, not celebrations: borders sharpen, elements lift slightly, and then settle.

This system explicitly rejects the generic dark SaaS developer aesthetic: uniform card grids, purple-on-charcoal scroll reveals, floating particle effects, and identical uppercase eyebrow labels scaffolding every section. It also rejects corporate light grays, the editorial-magazine lane, and brutalist experimentation.
keyCharacteristics: Three-tier warm dark stack (Night Field → Raised Surface → Elevated Card) creates depth without shadows at rest
One committed accent color used exclusively as a signal: CTAs, hover borders, active labels
JetBrains Mono used only for metadata and code — never body copy, never display
Hover pattern: accent border + slight Y lift. No celebration, just confirmation
Backdrop-blur navbar is the only surface with blur; glassmorphism is otherwise prohibited

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Marty Supreme Orange appears on ≤15% of any given screen. Its rarity is the signal. If the accent is everywhere, nothing is signaled.

rules.name: The Tonal Stack Rule
rules.body: Depth is expressed through the three-tier warm neutral ramp (Night Field → Raised Surface → Elevated Card). Do not add new warm-dark tones to the stack.

rules.name: The Mono-as-Metadata Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono labels one thing: this is technical data, not prose. Use it for skill chips, tech tags, section labels, the email address, and inline code. Never for body paragraphs, headings, or any text longer than a short phrase.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: No surface casts a shadow in its default state. Depth is tonal. Shadows appear only as state response: hover lifts a card, focus rings a button, scroll reveals the navbar edge.

rules.name: The One Blur Rule
rules.body: Backdrop-filter blur is used exclusively on the scrolled navbar. Any additional blur panels are glassmorphism by default and are prohibited.

dos: Use the three-tier tonal stack (Night Field → Raised Surface → Elevated Card) when a new surface needs to feel distinct
Reserve Marty Supreme Orange for interactive signals: primary buttons, hover borders, active-state labels
Use JetBrains Mono exclusively for metadata: tech tags, skill tags, code snippets, the email address
Apply the hover pattern consistently: accent border transition + Y lift (-2px small, -4px cards)
Add @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) alternatives for all animations
Use Warm Stone (#b8af98) for body-sized secondary text — approximately 9:1 contrast, WCAG AAA
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Previously violated on hero name and avatar initials — both now fixed
Don't use the generic dark SaaS developer aesthetic: identical card grids, floating particles, eyebrow labels on every heading
Don't put uppercase tracked mono labels above every section heading — AI-scaffold grammar, not brand voice
Don't use the editorial-magazine aesthetic: italic display serifs, ruled separators, broadsheet columns
Don't use Warm Ash (#857a68) for body paragraph copy — use Warm Stone (#b8af98) for comfort margin
Don't add decorative gradient stripes on cards (previously present on plan cards, now removed)
Don't add backdrop blur to any surface other than the scrolled navbar
Don't nest cards inside cards — there is no fourth tier in the tonal stack
